metadata.publisher: Uganda Printing and Publishing Corporation (UPPC), Entebbe
metadata.source_authority: Republic of Uganda (Laws of Uganda revised-edition volume)
metadata.source_note: National Social Security Fund Act (Chapter 230) sections 10-12 from the Fund's hosted scan of the Laws of Uganda revised-edition volume pages (running heads "[Cap. 230", volume pagination 8208 onward; OCR at 300 dpi). Section 10: standard contribution of fifteen percent of monthly total wages paid by the contributing employer; section 11: the employer may deduct the employee's share of five percent; section 12: special contribution of ten percent for excepted employees. The rates are original Act 8 of 1985 text, unchanged by the NSSF (Amendment) Act 2021 (print held for diligence; it modernises definitions, membership and voluntary contributions only).
metadata.title: National Social Security Fund Act (Cap. 230) — standard, employee-share and special contributions (ss. 10-12)
